name: netsuite-erp-starter
description: NetSuite-like mini-ERP starter — Java (Spring Boot) ERP core + NestJS reporting/gateway + React (Vite) SPA, orchestrated by ace-engine.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:erp-core && pnpm run build:reporting && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.build:node: pnpm run build:reporting && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @netsuite-erp/reporting run typecheck && pnpm --filter @netsuite-erp/frontend run typecheck
scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Run services individually: pnpm run dev:erp-core | dev:reporting | dev:frontend, or let ace-engine orchestrate via ace.json')"
